current_status_next_steps:
Please execute the commands in London mzone787

- Run below command as genctl request 
1. kubectl annotate storagelayers -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509  r018-186785de-0997-4afd-984b-fcc95c075729 need_deletion="true" --overwrite

- Run below command as rias request 
2. kubectl patch volumespec -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509  r018-9e00aa89-e218-4618-9e9a-d0eb6560c800 --type='json' -p="[{\"op\": \"replace\", \"path\": \"/spec/volumeImmutable\", \"value\":false}, {\"op\": \"replace\", \"path\": \"/spec/volumeLockReason\", \"value\":''}, {\"op\": \"replace\", \"path\": \"/spec/volumeLockToken\", \"value\":''}, {\"op\": \"replace\", \"path\": \"/spec/volumeLockTTL\", \"value\":0}]"

- Run below command as genctl request 
3.  kubectl delete computeaction -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509 BLOCKCOMMITr018-186785de-0997-4afd-984b-fcc95c075729

if its taking time please execute this command to remove finalizers on computeaction.

kubectl patch computeaction -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509 BLOCKCOMMITr018-186785de-0997-4afd-984b-fcc95c075729 --type merge --patch '{"metadata": {"finalizers":[]}}'

- Run below command as genctl request 
4. kubectl get computeaction -n aeaedb22e067471bade642c07c030509

 -- runbook link -- 
 https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/stg-snap-logdna-003-volume-locked-due-to-zsnap_blockcommit.html#active-issues
